name: cloud-devops-marketplace
description: Private marketplace for DevOps plugins enforcing infrastructure standards and enabling diagnostics

plugins.name: terraform-standards
plugins.description: Enforce tagging, naming conventions, and encryption in Terraform code with pre-apply checklist and commit-blocking hook

plugins.name: k8s-troubleshooter
plugins.description: Diagnose Kubernetes pod failures and validate manifest best practices (CKA standards)

plugins.name: aws-security-review
plugins.description: Flag overly permissive IAM policies, public S3 buckets, and unrestricted security groups
